title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz General - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Allianz General - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
